bird.name: Black-billed amazon
bird.summary: The black-billed amazon (Amazona agilis) is a parrot endemic to Jamaica. Sometimes called the black-billed parrot, this amazon parrot is mo…

relations.subject: Black-billed amazon
relations.evidence: The black-billed amazon was once as common as the yellow-billed amazon, but has become much rarer due to deforestation and hurricane damage fragmenting its forest, poaching for food and the pet trade in wild parrots.{{ cite book | last=Collar | first=N.J
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
